title: AIM Apply Output Schema (aim-apply-v1.0)
description: Output schema for the AIM Applier stage (pipeline/engine/apply_base.py → apply-YYYY-MM-DD.json + apply-latest.json). Sprint 3 Step 3 role insertion (AD-2026-04-23j). The Applier sits downstream of the Composer and reads all three upstream outputs (interpret-latest.json, review-latest.json, compose-latest.json) to produce a cycle manifest. MVP is LLM-free — deterministic stitching only; per design E6. Patches are emitted under AMEND-D stub (all arrays empty in MVP). Role 6 contract: (cycle_id, ready_to_publish, patches_applied/rejected/deferred/looped_back) + publisher_artefacts handoff for the Publisher role (not yet implemented).

applied_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the applier engine ran.

applier_model.description: Always null in MVP — applier is LLM-free (E6). Reserved for future Appendix-A patch execution (AMEND-D).

applier_deterministic.description: MVP guarantee: the applier is a pure deterministic stitcher. Byte-identical replay given the same three input SHAs + today's date.

applier_flags.description: Informational flags only — never block publication. All flag values are pre-enumerated; new flags require a whitelist extension.

applier_error.description: True when any required input is missing. Forces ready_to_publish=false with hold_reason='applier_error'.

cycle_id.description: Canonical per-cycle identifier in form '{abbr}-YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. 'agm-2026-04-23'). Derived from interpret._meta.synthesised_at or today's date. Null only on applier_error (missing inputs).

methodology_version.description: Monitor methodology version (e.g. 'agm-methodology-2026-Q2'). Sourced from metadata.yml stages.applier.methodology_version.

week_ending.description: ISO date for the cycle's week-ending anchor. Sourced from interpret._meta.week_ending (preferred) or review._meta.interpret_meta.week_ending (fallback).

inputs.description: Provenance block for the three upstream artefacts. content_sha1 enables replay determinism checks.

patches_applied.description: MVP: always empty. AMEND-D stub — Appendix-A-form patch execution deferred until Interpreter emits patches in Appendix A shape (Step 5 or later). Future items will conform to Appendix A §1.3 (Role 6 contract).

ready_to_publish.description: True iff review.verdict ∈ {APPROVE, APPROVE_WITH_FLAGS, SKIP_NULL_CYCLE} AND compose._meta.composer_error is false. SKIP_NULL_CYCLE is publish-eligible — null-cycle briefs still render and publish (design §3.1 rule 4). Null only when applier could not reach the decision (error path).

publisher_artefacts.description: Handoff block for the Publisher role (Role 7 — not yet implemented). Paths are relative to monitor slug; the Publisher resolves them at publish time.

chains_artefact.description: Pointer to the companion chains-latest.json (public claim→review→patch→evidence chains).

provenance.description: Workflow provenance. Public mirror (apply-latest.json) has the three *_workflow_run_id fields stripped per design §3.1; the dated copy retains them for internal replay.
